top_stories.title: Microsoft makes passkeys default and retires SMS MFA by 2027
top_stories.summary: Microsoft is making passkeys the default authentication method in Microsoft Entra ID starting September 1, while retiring Microsoft-provided SMS and voice MFA in February 2027. Organizations relying on telephony-based MFA will need to migrate to alternative methods before the February 2027 deadline.

top_stories.title: Snowpick: Open-source ServiceNow exposure scanner
top_stories.summary: Bishop Fox released an open-source Go tool called Snowpick that scans ServiceNow instances for unauthenticated data exposure vulnerabilities. During authorized penetration tests across 166 ServiceNow instances, 31% returned records or confirmed exposure to unauthenticated requests.

top_stories.title: Teleport enhances Identity Security platform with new AI agent behavior controls
top_stories.summary: Teleport has expanded its Identity Security platform with three new capabilities—Beams Session Summaries, Agentic Classifiers, and Risk Scoring—aimed at controlling AI agent behavior within production infrastructure. The additions are designed to enforce boundaries on autonomous agents and follow Teleport's white paper arguing that zero trust principles must be extended to govern agentic systems.

top_stories.title: authID Selected by Top Global Retailer to Deploy Biometric Authentication for 100K+ Employees
top_stories.summary: authID has been selected by a major global retailer to deploy biometric authentication for over 100,000 employees. The deployment will cover employee onboarding and access management, targeting prevention of ransomware and other attack vectors.

top_stories.title: Closing the Identity Gaps in Critical Infrastructure Security
top_stories.summary: Specops Software has published guidance on securing critical infrastructure by addressing identity gaps through Zero Trust principles. The article focuses on verifying both user identities and device trust before granting access, with emphasis on preventing attacks via stolen credentials and compromised accounts.

news.title: Police dismantle Kratos phishing platform, arrest developer
news.summary: German and U.S. authorities dismantled the Kratos phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) platform and arrested its developer in Indonesia. Kratos was a globally operating platform enabling credential phishing attacks, which directly undermines authentication and identity security.

news.title: Shufti simplifies cross-border compliance with the Glocal Platform
news.summary: Shufti has launched the Shufti Glocal Platform, a compliance lifecycle management solution that consolidates identity verification, fraud prevention, risk assessment, and regulatory compliance into a single platform. The platform is designed to replace the need for multiple regional compliance providers when organizations expand into new markets.

news.title: Critical ServiceNow AI Platform Flaw Exploited for Unauthenticated Code Execution
news.summary: A critical sandbox escape vulnerability (CVE-2026-6875, CVSS 9.5) in the ServiceNow AI Platform is being actively exploited in the wild, allowing unauthenticated users to execute arbitrary code. ServiceNow is widely used in enterprise environments for IT service management and integrates with IAM workflows, making unauthenticated remote code execution directly relevant to access control and identity security teams.

news.title: Securing ASP.NET Core APIs with Microsoft Entra ID Authentication
news.summary: The article covers how to implement Microsoft Entra ID authentication for ASP.NET Core APIs. It addresses authentication configuration and best practices for API security using Microsoft's IAM platform.

news.title: HOLLOWGRAPH malware turns Microsoft 365 calendars into an espionage channel
news.summary: Group-IB researchers discovered HOLLOWGRAPH malware that uses Microsoft 365 calendar appointments dated to 2050 to hide commands and exfiltrate stolen data. The campaign has been tied to Iranian espionage activity targeting Microsoft 365 environments.

news.title: Security Is a Platform Property, Not a Pipeline Step
news.summary: The article describes a real-world implementation of Azure RBAC-only access controls and Privileged Identity Management (PIM) for Terraform state management, following Microsoft Defender for Cloud recommendations. The scenario involves disabling key-based authentication on Azure storage in favor of identity-based access controls, directly touching on authorization and privileged access management concepts.

news.title: Week in review: High severity WordPress vulnerabilities, fake OAuth IDs bypass sign-in logs
news.summary: A weekly security review highlights fake OAuth IDs being used to bypass sign-in logs, directly relevant to authentication and identity monitoring. The article also covers WordPress vulnerabilities, though the OAuth bypass component addresses a specific IAM concern around identity audit trail integrity.

news.title: OpenSSL HollowByte Flaw Could Freeze Server Memory with 11-Byte TLS Requests
news.summary: Okta's Red Team discovered and reported a denial-of-service vulnerability in OpenSSL, dubbed "HollowByte," which allows an 11-byte TLS request to cause an unpatched server to reserve up to 131 KB of memory indefinitely. OpenSSL quietly shipped a fix in June without a CVE, advisory, or changelog entry, prompting Okta to publish their own disclosure.

news.title: OpenSSL Fixes HollowByte Memory Exhaustion Bug
news.summary: Okta's Red Team discovered and disclosed "HollowByte," a denial-of-service vulnerability in OpenSSL involving an 11-byte flaw that allows remote attackers to exhaust server memory. The vulnerability was reported by Okta and subsequently fixed by OpenSSL.

news.title: New NadMesh Botnet Hunts Exposed AI Services for Cloud Keys and Kubernetes Tokens
news.summary: A Go-based botnet named NadMesh has been discovered targeting exposed AI services to harvest cloud credentials, with the operator's dashboard reporting 3,811 unique AWS keys collected. The botnet uses Shodan to identify exposed AI tools such as ComfyUI, Ollama, and Langflow, then extracts AWS keys and Kubernetes tokens from those environments.

news.title: AI Security: How AI assistants securely assess your personal data
news.summary: The article explains how AI assistants use OAuth 2.0 On-Behalf-Of (OBO) token delegation to securely access personal data. The piece covers the authorization flow that enables AI systems to act on behalf of users while maintaining secure, scoped access controls.

news.title: Identity Attacks Overtake Exploits as Top Ransomware Cause
news.summary: Identity-based attacks have surpassed exploits as the leading root cause of ransomware incidents. MFA was present in 97% of credential-based attacks yet failed to prevent compromise, highlighting critical gaps in authentication defenses.

news.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
news.summary: CISA published a postmortem on a data breach in which a contractor accidentally exposed dozens of internal credentials, including AWS GovCloud keys, in a public GitHub repository for nearly six months. The incident highlights credential management failures and was only identified after KrebsOnSecurity notified the agency.

news.title: Scattered Spider Hackers Plead Guilty on Day 1 of Trial
news.summary: Two members of the Scattered Spider cybercrime group pleaded guilty in the UK to charges related to the August 2024 cyberattack on Transport for London. Scattered Spider is known for sophisticated social engineering and identity-based attacks, including SIM swapping and MFA bypass techniques used to compromise enterprise systems.

news.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
news.summary: Hackers exploited Meta's AI support assistant bot to reset Instagram account passwords, enabling account takeovers including high-profile accounts belonging to the Obama White House and a U.S. Space Force official. Instructions for manipulating the AI bot to bypass account authentication controls were shared on Telegram, resulting in brief but visible account defacements with pro-Iranian content.
